entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: The crop being studied, specifically Glycine max cv. Wayne

entities.name: GLYCINE MAX
entities.description: The scientific name of the soybean plant used in the study

entities.name: EXTENDED DRYING CYCLE
entities.description: The experimental procedure used to induce water deficits in the field

entities.name: WATER DEFICITS
entities.description: The state of lacking sufficient water used to test leaf sensitivity

entities.name: LEAF SENSITIVITY
entities.description: The response of soybean leaves to water deficits

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of water to plots to compare against non-irrigated ones

entities.name: NON-IRRIGATION
entities.description: The absence of water application in plots

entities.name: LEAFLET SIZE AND NUMBER
entities.description: The average size and count of leaflets per plant

entities.name: LEAF AREA DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The distribution of leaf area within the plant canopy

entities.name: MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by lack of moisture affecting leaf area distribution

entities.name: LEAF SENESCENCE
entities.description: The process of leaf aging and death

entities.name: LIGHT PENETRATION
entities.description: The ability of light to reach lower depths of the canopy

entities.name: LEAF ENLARGEMENT
entities.description: The growth and expansion of leaves

entities.name: LEAF-WATER POTENTIAL
entities.description: A measure of the water tension in the leaf used to identify growth thresholds

entities.name: STOMATAL CONDUCTANCE
entities.description: The rate of passage of carbon dioxide entering or water vapor exiting through the stomata
